title: calystegia sepium var. hantelmannii
intro: Calystegia sepium var. hantelmannii, also known as the climbing bindweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Convolvulaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be beneficial for treating wounds, reducing pain and inflammation, and fighting off infections. The health benefits of Calystegia sepium var. hantelmannii include its ability to support respiratory health, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
